title: Godot 4.5.1 Stable GitHub Release
citation: Godot Engine. Godot 4.5.1-stable release assets and repository license metadata. GitHub. Accessed 2026-05-06.
permitted_uses: Developer-local Godot editor binary download for OpenClinXR sidecar source import checks.
claims_supported: The GitHub release exposes a Godot_v4.5.1-stable_macos.universal.zip editor asset.
The Godot repository GitHub license metadata identifies the repository license as MIT.
The downloaded macOS universal editor zip was verified against the release SHA512-SUMS.txt before local headless import evidence was generated.
claims_not_supported: That OpenClinXR may redistribute Godot binaries without packaging and legal review.
That Godot import evidence proves Quest microphone capture, playback, Opus encode/decode, latency, or production voice readiness.
That Godot editor import evidence proves clinical voice simulation validity.
